heading: Personnel policies at the Department of State
label: 8243 Personnel policies at the Department of State

children.text: Providing performance pay under to such members and employees who carry out their assignment in an outstanding manner.section 3965 of this title
Considering such an assignment as a basis for promotion into the Senior Foreign Service.

Providing Foreign Service Awards under to such members and employees who provide distinguished or meritorious service in the promotion of democracy or the protection of human rights.section 4013 of this title
